concerns.text: Task T040 implements OLS regression instead of the required fixed-effects regression (FR-006). This is a direct violation of a functional requirement.
Task T039a explicitly excludes DP-difference vs DI-ratio correlation pairs, contradicting FR-005's requirement to compute *all* pairwise correlations.
No tasks explicitly include the Reference-Validator Agent citation verification workflow mandated by Constitution Principle II. This is a critical oversight.

Tasks T049-T052 shift terminology from 'metric selection guidance' (FR-009) to 'associational guidance,' potentially weakening the original requirement to align with FR-008. This requires clarification.
No verification task ensures all correlation and regression outputs include effect sizes and confidence intervals as required by Constitution Principle VII.
SC-005 requires power analysis documentation in research.md, but no task explicitly guarantees this documentation exists *before* analysis execution.
The plan documents a deviation from FR-006 (OLS instead of fixed-effects regression) but doesn't justify it against the spec's requirements. This needs a stronger rationale.
Constitution Principle I requires comprehensive seed pinning, but tasks only show seed pinning in specific modules. An audit task is needed to verify complete coverage.
While checksums are recorded, there's no explicit task verifying that the raw data remains unmodified, as required by Constitution Principle III.
